markdownRemark.html:
Well this is a leap in a very different direction for me.

I’ve started this blog - https://kmckelvin.com in response to various people around me encouraging me to start writing about my software development endeavours.  I’ve been a passionate coder/geek for far longer than anyone really remembers and I believe that I can convey some of the ideas I come up with to others using this blog.
